title: Forager's Insight
description:
A Farmer's Delight addon that brings foraging to Minecraft! 

Players can forage for crops in the wild, finding uses from familiar vanilla plants as well as the occasional new flora!

In addition, Forager's Insight adds several new features!
body:
![fi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae054e605d95f604cd4fe294c297013ab5df77f1.png)
**Forager's Insight** is an addon for **[Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight)** that brings foraging to Minecraft as well as new flora and other enhancements to nature! 

Players can traverse biomes both familiar and new to forage for new crops, blocks, features and more!

Forager's Insight will also rewards players that harvest their crops, tend to livestock or enjoy foraging things, by adding various new sources of XP for said actions!

![Current Patch as of 2/11/26](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/05c8bc89ea82ef6eee6a01df72bddfcb580f1a98.png)
